client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.general_idea: Replace Socket.IO client with SockJS and STOMP to align with the server-side protocol change.
client/src/components/SocketComponent.ts.why_exists: The server was migrated from Socket.IO to SockJS/STOMP (as indicated by git log 'change to sockjs' and 'Working connection between Spring server and SockJS'). The old Socket.IO client cannot communicate with the new server protocol, resulting in connection failures.
